hypothesis: Signals already sized to zero shares may be contaminating scarce-slot planning; excluding them before breakout deferral and slot slicing could release higher-quality candidates without changing signals, exits, LLM behavior, or sizing multipliers.
why_not_llm_soft_ranking: LLM soft-ranking remains production-sample limited, so this tested a deterministic shared slot-routing alpha.

parameters.single_causal_variable: drop zero-share candidates before shared entry planning
parameters.baseline: plan_entry_candidates keeps zero-share sized signals through deferral and slot slicing; backtester later records them as no_shares
parameters.tested_value: plan_entry_candidates removes signals whose sizing.shares_to_buy <= 0 before scarce-slot breakout deferral and slot slicing

market_regime_summary.mid_weak: rotation-heavy bull after accepted allocation stack
market_regime_summary.old_thin: mixed-to-weak older tape with weakest win rate

gate4_basis: Rejected and rolled back. The shared slot-routing change materially damaged mid_weak and old_thin while leaving late_strong unchanged.
mechanism_insight: Zero-share candidates are not merely harmless slot pollution. In the current ordering stack, preserving them through slot planning sometimes blocks worse later candidates; removing them releases lower-quality trades in weaker tapes.

llm_metrics.blocker_relation: LLM soft-ranking data was insufficient, so this deterministic slot-routing alpha was tested instead.

rejection_reason: Aggregate EV regressed by -0.1752 and aggregate PnL fell by $7,876.12; no window improved on EV.
do_not_repeat_without_new_evidence: Dropping zero-share sized candidates before shared entry planning
Assuming no_shares candidates are slot-routing noise without opportunity-cost proof
Using no_shares count alone as evidence for a slot-allocation alpha
next_retry_requires: Candidate forward-quality evidence showing which released candidates are better than the blocked ones
A state-specific slot-routing discriminator rather than a blanket zero-share pre-filter
Forward evidence that no_shares blocking is harmful in live candidate sequences
